behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md explicitly names all literal strings asserted by tests including 'inner class Value(val value: T)', 'public suspend fun next(): Value?', 'state.continuation.resume(Value(value))', 'handleActions<Value>', '__continuation(false, null)', '__continuation(true, _result.value)', the C header signature, Swift closure patterns, and the convertBlockPtrToKotlinFunction type.

no_solution_leakage.reason: The Implementation Requirements section dictates exact code strings (e.g., 'state.continuation.resume(Value(value))', '__continuation(false, null)', 'if arg0 {', 'continuation(.some(element))') — this is effectively prescribing the fix verbatim rather than describing the broken behavior.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on exact gold-specific tokens like 'inner class Value(val value: T)', 'handleActions<Value>' count>=2, 'continuation(.some(element))', '{ arg0, arg1 in' — an equally correct fix using different naming (e.g., 'Wrapper', 'hasValue', different parameter names) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All f2p tests use 'assert X in content' on file reads (test_value_wrapper_class_exists, test_next_function_returns_value_type, etc.); only swift-format lint and structure checks execute anything, and those are p2p.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub/no-op implementation wouldn't contain the required literal strings, so these text-match tests do require the expected edits even though they don't verify runtime behavior.

behavior_in_tests.reason: instruction.md mandates modifying sequences.kt and sequences.swift to add a nullable flow test, but test_outputs.py never verifies these files' contents (only existence in test_repo_structure).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with clear docstrings indicating FAIL-TO-PASS vs PASS-TO-PASS and what each verifies.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces source code, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers match between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: instruction.md names specific files, specific classes ('SwiftFlowIterator'), exact method names ('emit()', 'next()'), and dictates the exact string replacements — localization and fix content are fully revealed.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd/config edit task.
